name: Echo Transfer
desc_clean: Wurmkin 0 I cannot yet decipher all of their symbols etched into the stone, but the Wurmkin's stoneforms describe the creation of these Echoes as part of a great Titan sacrifice.
mechanic_summary: Echo Transfer to Spell klanu Wurmkin. Wurmkin 0 I cannot yet decipher all of their symbols etched into the stone, but the Wurmkin's stoneforms describe the creation of these Echoes as part of a great Titan sacrifice. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Wurmkin 0 I cannot yet decipher all of their symbols etched into the stone, but the Wurmkin's stoneforms describe the creation of these Echoes as part of a great Titan sacrifice. The Titan's knowledge lives on in the perfect crystalline structures. More sacrifice and exile, but for what?
